lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller
Joey and Rachel's apartment

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, you and Rachel tonight, huh?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. It's actually our first official date

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow! So tonight may be the night! You're nervous?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Naa, no. This is the part I'm actually good at.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What must it be like not to be crippled by fear and self-loathing.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (pause) It's OK!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How can you be so confident?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I... I know exactly what I'm gonna do!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really? Like you have a routine?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no no no no. See. Each woman is different.You have to appreciate their uniqueness.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I do six things! First, I look deep in her eyes. Then, I kiss her. Next I take my hand and I softly graze her thigh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You mean like this? (he starts touching his thigh in a funny and awkard way)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: NO! Not like that, no no. No, like this. (He starts lightly grazing Chandler's thigh)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I see what you mean, that's quite nice. (They look at each other, both embarassed)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: More foosball?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...and beer!!
OPENING CREDITS
Central Perk. Ross and Chandler are on the couch

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross and Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Chandler) Hey sweetie! (they kiss)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looking at Monica's legs) WOW!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Stop staring at my wife's legs! No no! Stop staring at your sister's legs!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry, it's just... how did you get so tan?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She went on one of those spray-on tan places.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eh, you got a spray-on tan?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler gets pedicures!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughing) Why, why you do, like with the-the toe separators?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Why...why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Still, I can't believe that's sprayed on... I mean, it looks really good. I wonder if I should get one!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure, then you should get a mini skirt so you can really show it off.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, do you get colours or just French tips?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There. Here's their card.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks. (he takes the card) Hey, I know where this place is! It used to be an X-rated video... (pauses when he realizes what he is saying) florist. (he goes away)
Phoebe enters

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, you won't believe who moved back to town.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know, Amanda! Ah! She called me too! She's the worst!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who's Amanda?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's this girl who used to live in the building before you did. Then she moved to England and she picked up this fake British accent. On the machine this is her message. (she apes Amanda using an awful British accent) "Monica, darling! It's Amanda calling!"

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you trying to do a British accent?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (pause) (to Phoebe) Chandler gets pedicures!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Just so I know, how many more of those can I expect?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know what Amanda said to me when she got me on the phone? (apes Amanda in a british accent) "Oh, so sorry to catch you on your Mo-Bile!" If-if you don't wanna get me on my mo-Bile, don't call me on my mo-Bile!"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know, and she's always bragging about all the famous people she's met.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I know! "Oh...I slept with Billy Joel". All right, who hasn't?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, what are we gonna do! I don't wanna see her!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ugh, Let's just cut her out!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Cut her out of our lives! Just ignore her calls and dodge her 'till she gets the point!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I guess we could try that, but... it seems so harsh! (to Chandler) Have you ever done that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, had it done to me though. Feels good !
At the tanning salon. Ross and a male assistant are walking through a hall

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Alright Mr. Geller! Right this way! So, how dark do you wanna be? We have one, two or three.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well... I like how you look, what are you?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Puerto Rican.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Two, I think a two.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: You've got to face the red light. When the red light goes on the spraying is about to start so close your eyes. When the spraying stops, count to five. Pat yourself down to avoid drip marks then turn around so we can get your back. Got it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Spray, count, pat, then turn, spray, count and pat.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Wow, you catch on quick.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I have a PhD, so... (assistant walk out, not impressed by this statement)
Ross takes his bathrobe off and he enters the tanning booth. He stands up in front of the red light and the sprayer starts and sprays his face and torso

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: One Mississipi, two Mississipi, Three Mis...(the sprayer starts again, spraying him in the face and torso again) WAIT! WAIT! I'm not-I've not finished counting!! (he leaves the booth) (the assistant enters the room)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You sprayed my front twice!

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: You've never turned?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I barely even got to three Mississippi.

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Mississippi? I said count to five'!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mississippilesly? (pause) Well, how bad is it?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Ain't that bad yet, but it keeps getting darker for the next four hours.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, how dark is it gonna get?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: You got sprayed with two two' s and...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm a four?

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: Yeah, but you're back's a zero. You're gonna wanna even that out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sarcastically) Really!

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: You might wanna get back in there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (annoyed) Ok!
The assistant leaves and Ross goes back in the spray-on tan booth and turns his back to the spray nozzles, facing the back wall

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait, wait a minute, there's no light on the back wall! How do I know when it's gonna start? Hello? (he slowly turns and the spraying begins, on his face) Ah, oh, ah! (he turns, but then he turns again and is sprayed in the front again) Ah! (he spits and angrily goes out of the spray-on tan booth and the assistant enters the room) The same thing happened again!

lines.speaker: Assistant
lines.text: You got two more twos?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (hysterically) I'm an eight!
Joey's apartment. Joey and Rachel enter the room

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thanks for dinner.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I thought you paid. (Rachel does not answer and seems puzzled) Ha, guess we won't be going back there!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Joey and Rachel start kissing

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey what do you say, we move this onto the likes of the couch?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I say 'cheesy line', but ok.
They move on the couch and start kissing again. Joey does his grazing on Rachel's thigh and she slaps his hand

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am sorry, I don't know, I am sorry, I don't know why I did that!

lines.speaker: Joey and Rachel
lines.text: Okay

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, so sorry.
They start kissing again and, when Joey grazes her thigh, she slaps him on his hand again

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am sorry! Again... I don't know, I don't know what happened, I must be nervous!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't get it, Chandler loved it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, ok, ok. I promise, I promise, I promise, I won't do it again. I really do. I promise. This is gonna be great.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok.
They start kissing again and when Joey grazes, she slaps him three times, on the hand, and on both cheeks

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (a little giddy) Uh, was that good for you?
Monica's apartment. Monica and Phoebe are reading magazines when the phone rings and Phoebe reaches to pick it up

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Phoebe) No, no, don't get it. Let the machine pick up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, yeah. Could be Rachel asking if someone could baby-sit again.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It could be Amanda!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, you're right! I was just kidding about Rachel. Babysitting is a gas!
The machine picks up the phone

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Hello Monica. It's Amanda calling again. I am in the neighborhood hoping I can pop by your flat!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're from Yonkers! Your last name is Buffo-Martisis!

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Let's see.. to assure you get this directly, ring me back on my mobile.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, don't hold thy breath!
Sound of dialing numbers is heard from the speaker of the machine

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello? Is someone on the line?

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Yes, I was looking for Monica.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hang on, she's right here. (he enters the living room and hands the phone to Monica) Someone's on the phone, for ya.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We weren't picking up, it's Amanda!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Amanda) I get pedicures!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi Amanda! Actually now... it's... is not a good time. Dinner tomorrow night? (Phoebe mouths 'no') Ok, Phoebe and I will see you then!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why, why, why didn't you just say no!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, I said 'no' to her coming over now! I couldn't say 'no' twice! I get this uncontrollable need to please people!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (leaving) Fine, fine! You would not hold up well under torture!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And you would?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I did!
Joey's apartment. Joey and Rachel are sitting on the couch

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Rach, you sure you wanna do this?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Absolutely! Absolutely. I d... it's just a little weird, it's you, and it's me, it's just gonna take some getting used to.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok. Well, how, how can we make it easier?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, let's work from the top down! (Joey nods, but then puzzled because he does not get it) Just work the bra, Joe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, yeah, got it.

lines.speaker: Rachel and Joey
lines.text: Okay.
They start kissing and Joey starts to undo her bra, but fails completely

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: This thing welded shut?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, turn around, I got to get a look at this thing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!
Joey starts trying to undo her bra, but it won't go.The elastic band snaps back, hurting Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sorry!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well this is romantic!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry! (He stands up) This never happened to me before! I'm an expert at taking off bras! I can do it with one hand! I can do it with my eyes closed! One time I just looked at one, and it popped open! I blame your bra!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's a standard issue bra clasp!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Then I blame you! Yeah! That's right! You threw me off with all your slapping!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok well, well I'm really, I'm sorry about that Joey, but do you think that maybe on some level, you don't want to take off my bra?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (contemplates for a few moments what Rachel just said) NAH! I don't have another level!!
Monica and Chandler's apartment
Chandler is at the table reading; Monica puts some food for him on the table. Ross walks in looking very tanned. Chandler and Monica look up at him smiling.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hold on! There is something different.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I went to that tanning place your wife suggested.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Was that place... The Sun?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh! And it gets worse! (Turns his side to Chandler and Monica and pulls up his shirt. There's a distinct line across his body, where his belly is very tanned and his back is very pale.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh My God! You can do a duet of Ebony and Ivory all by yourself!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How could you mess this up? It's so easy? You go into the booth, you count to five and you turn around!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looks at her suspiciously) How do you count to five?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: One Two Three...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Yells) Damnit! (Goes to the door to leave. Rachel just enters, sees him and starts laughing)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (laughing) oooh! Oh oh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Still yelling) I Know!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: oh oh! What is up with Miss Hawaiian Tropic?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How was your date with Joey?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, it was good.. until we got back to our apartment, and then we were fooling around and he started to put his hand up my leg and I kept slapping it away!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You didn't like that?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, it wasn't just me, alright? He freaked out too! He couldn't even undo my bra!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow, really? One time he just looked at my bra and it popped open.
Chandler starts looking at her bra

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I do not know what's wrong with us, I mean, we have kissed before and that's been great! But this time it was leading somewhere and I was very aware of the fact that it was Joey touching me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you guys have been friends forever. Remember the first time that you kissed Ross? How weird that was? You couldn't stop laughing? You got through that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (looking thoughtful) Ok, that's true. That's true, we can do this. You're right, you're right, we can do this. We're just gonna power through!
Joey walks in

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Chandler can I talk to you for a second (points to the hall).

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Joey) No need!! Problem solved, we are powering through (At which point she grabs his hand and pulls him back to their apartment).
Chandler resumes staring at Monica's bra

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (sees what he is doing) Chandler, stop! It is not going to pop open!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (without taking his eyes off the bra) You don't know! (Monica just smiles)
Central Perk.
Phoebe is sitting on the couch. Monica walks in.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is Amanda here yet?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (sits down) Oh good. Good, look I'm so sorry, for screwing up that cutting-her-out plan. But I have a new plan. Chandler agreed to call here in a few minutes with an emergency.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Well, what kind of emergency that gets us both out of here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, what do you think of Mike and Chandler being in a car accident?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (makes a face) Are you kidding, I love it!
A blonde woman walks in. Supposedly Amanda

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Hi! (Phoebe and Amanda hug)

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: (To Monica) Hello!
Monica holds her hands out for a hug, but instead of hugging her, Amanda hangs her purse on one of Monica's extended arms.

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: (In a fake British accent) It's so nice to see you! Both of you! Look at me. Look how young I look! (gives her coat to Monica as well) Oh gosh! We have so much to catch up on! But first things first: touch my abs (at which point she grabs both Phoebe and Monica's hands and places them both on her stomach) I don't exercise at all! (she pulls them down to sit.) Oh gosh, so Monica, you're married!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (beaming) Yeah! Yeah! His name is Chandler and...

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: (To Phoebe) Smell my neck! (Phoebe does so) It's not perfume! It's me! It's my natural scent!
Monica looks shocked

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Musty!

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Oh! Gosh! This is brilliant. Gosh, it's just like old times. I'm so happy you two are friends again!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: When were we not friends?

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Well, it was 1992, and I remember because that was the year I had sex with Evil Knievel (She starts laughing very proudly).

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ehm, we were friends in 1992.

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: (to Phoebe) No I distinctly remember you were dodging her (points at Monica) calls and trying to avoid seeing her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Phoebe) You were going to cut me out?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well...kinda.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh My God!

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Oh! Bugger. Should I not have said that? I feel like a perfect arse!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah well, in America you're just an "ass".
Monica's mobile starts ringing. She picks it up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Into the phone) Hello? Chandler, what's wrong? (She listens) Oh my God, are you alright? (listens some more) Yeah, I'll be right there. (She hangs up and speaks to Amanda) I'm so sorry, but Chandler was in a car accident. (She gets up)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Also gets up and starts taking her purse) Oh my God. Was Mike with him?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nope! (She turns and leaves)
Joey and Rachel's apartment.
Joey comes running in.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Rachel) Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Got champagne?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes ma'am, ready to Power through!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excellent! Stick it in the ice bucket, the phone is off the hook, and in the interest of powering through (Starts to remove her bra from under her clothes)...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh! (When she's done she throws her bra at him)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok (starts to light some candles) Sexy, sexy, very sexy, sexy. (Claps her hands and jumps at Joey, clearly very excited) Alright! Lets do it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, you're scaring me a little bit.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Get over it soldier, we've gotta do this! (She pulls him towards her and throws him onto the barcalounger) Ok. Aha! You like that huh?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh! yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You like that? (She climbs on the barcalounger seductively, putting her knees next to Joey's hips.) Let's take this into high gear (She pulls the barcalounger lever and seat reclines. She puts one of her knees between his legs and begins to kiss his neck.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: uh uh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah baby, I'll show you how we do it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no, no! You kneed me in my misters!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Oh my God! I'm so sorry. Joey? Are you ok?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (He just sits there, legs very close together with a painful look on his face) Soldier down!
[Monica and Chandlers apartment.]
Chandler is sitting on the couch reading. Monica walks in.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We are not friends with Phoebe anymore.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: If she asks, I protested a little, but ok!
Phoebe and Amanda walk in

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh Chandler! Thank God you're alive. Monica, can I talk to you outside for a minute?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I have nothing to say to you.

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: (announces more to herself than anyone else) Wow, my flat is twice this size!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Please, Monica? In the hall?
They both walk to the door and enter the hallway.

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Ooh, that accident must have been terrible. You look positively ghastly.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, aren't you a treat.
The hallway

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't believe you tried to cut me out. Why Phoebe, why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It was right after we were living together and you were driving me crazy, okay? You were really controlling and compulsive and shrill.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm still all those things!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're also so generous and kind and scrappy!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (starts smiling) I am scrappy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Exactly! Look, no matter what I tried to do, I couldn't keep you out of my life. Of all the people I have cut out, you were the only one who ever clawed her way back in.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's because I'm scrappy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, you are. And I'm so glad that you fought your way back in, because I don't know what I would do without you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I won't know what I would do without you.
They hug

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, I guess we should go back in. When you gave me another chance, I guess we should do the same for Amanda.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I guess you're right.
They both enter the apartment again, where Amanda is "dancing" for Chandler, but she's really terrible at it

lines.speaker: Amanda
lines.text: Can you believe it. I've never had any professional dance training.
Monica and Phoebe look at each other and leave the apartment again
A different spray-on tan center
Glenda, who works here, and Ross are walking to the room with the spray-on tan booth.

lines.speaker: Glenda
lines.text: Now, let me explain how this works. You go into the booth, and...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm gonna stop you right there, Glenda. Okay? Does it look like this is my first time, huh? Now I want 4 two's... and I want them all on my back.

lines.speaker: Glenda
lines.text: (quietly) Okay...
Ross enters the room, takes off his robe and enters the booth. He stands with his back to the nozzles and then realises that this booth has nozzles at both sides of the wall

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait a minute, there's two sets of nozzles, which one is it?
He turns around frantically from side to side.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Which... which... which... Which one is it?
He then stops turning, facing one of the nozzles, which starts spraying in this face and front again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: OH! SON OF A BITCH!
He now turns to the other side, which also starts spraying his face and front.
Joey and Rachel's
Joey and Rachel are both sitting on the couch. Joey keeping his knees pressed against each other

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What is the matter with us?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I know what's the matter with me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I mean with us, you know. I mean, is it supposed to be this... difficult?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know.
Chandler enters the apartment

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That fake British woman is a real bitch, but she sure can dance... Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! Hey, listen, can we ask you a question? When you and Monica first hooked up, was it weird going from friends to... more than that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Kinda... you know, sneaking around, having to hide from you guys...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, no, no... No, I mean... se-x-u-ally...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, was there a part of you that... felt like it was... really wrong?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually, no. No, it felt right. You know, it felt like uhm... I can't believe we haven't been doing this the whole time.
Rachel and Joey are still looking at Chandler, slowly letting his words get to them

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can tell from your expressions that that's the good news you were hoping for... Well, I'm gonna go continue to... spread the joy.(Chandler leaves the apartment. Joey sighs)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, just because it happened that way for them doesn't mean it has to happen that way for us.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, yeah... Absolutely. I mean, just because something's difficult doesn't mean that you quit.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right, totally.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, so we just keep trying and trying until we... do it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, and if doesn't work, then we'll be just one of those couples that never have sex.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's a... pla-an.
They both stare for a while, and then look at each other

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sighs) Wow... I did not see this coming.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't get it. I mean, I was so sure this was what I wanted.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hmmm... Me too...
She puts her head on Joey's shoulder and Joey kisses her on her head.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I wonder how Monica and Chandler could do it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I guess they weren't as good friends as we are.
Lifts her head from Joey's shoulder

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aah... I bet you're right.
They look at each other for a while

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I love ya.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Love you too... Alright, I'm going to bed.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, me too.
Rachel gets up, and Joey tries to get up, but halfway up he sits down again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, yeah, I'm not going anywhere for a while.
Joey takes the ice-bucket with the champagne bottle in it and puts it on his sore spot
ENDING CREDITS
Ross's apartment.
Ross is reading a National Geographic on his sofa when Chandler knocks on the door.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Dude, it's Chandler. Let me in.
Ross's face is now a VERY dark shade of brown.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Go away! I don't want to see anybody.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know, I went to the tanning place and the same thing happened to me. You have to let me in.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? Did you count Mississipily?
Ross walks to the door and opens it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude, you're not tanned.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I just had to get a picture of this.
Chandler holds up a camera and takes Ross's picture.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I see you later!
Ross closes the door
End
